deferred.blocker: Browser loads the candidate structurally, but every camera/material/frustum/source-reexport/raw-normalized visual attempt renders only the stage floor. Source re-export still has texture pack warnings and did not produce visible mesh in browser.
deferred.recommendation: Do not activate. Preserve as deferred source/material visibility blocker; next repair should inspect exported GLB materials/skin visibility in Blender and browser GLTF inspector before another conversion.

deferred.blocker: Raw-normalized browser attempt shows at most a tiny speck. Diagnostics show extreme source bounds/scale and source re-export has missing texture warnings; current candidate is not visually usable.
deferred.recommendation: Do not activate. Needs source-scale cleanup and texture/material repair before another VRM conversion.

deferred.blocker: Conversion and raw loader can complete, but camera/material/frustum/source-reexport/raw-normalized visual attempts still render only the stage floor.
deferred.recommendation: Do not activate. Needs source orientation/mesh/material visibility diagnosis outside the browser smoke path.
